title: poa pratensis var. urjanchaica
intro: Poa pratensis var. urjanchaica, also known as the Mountain Bluegrass, is a subspecies of perennial grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it effective in treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Poa pratensis var. urjanchaica include its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing, as well as its potential to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The herbal preparations of Poa pratensis var. urjanchaica include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
